description_long: This nightstand features a rustic, weathered wooden construction with a slanted roof-like top composed of uneven planks, some of which display greenish discoloration suggestive of moss or age. The body is boxy and solid, with vertical blue-toned wooden supports at the front corners and a flat, brown wooden panel forming the main structure. The side view reveals diagonal bracing for added stability, and the entire piece sits on a square, stone-textured base. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative carvings, giving it a utilitarian, almost shed-like appearance. The finish is matte and rough, emphasizing its rugged, outdoor-ready design.
description: A rustic, wooden nightstand with a slanted, weathered plank top and blue-toned vertical supports, set on a stone-textured base. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slanted, weathered plank top and blue-toned vertical supports framing a solid wooden panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, diagonal bracing, and the depth of the nightstand's structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden panel and the blue-toned supports, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slanted roof and the solid, uninterrupted wooden side panel.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or in a sheltered outdoor area
